meta_title: Removals Leatherhead - Removals and Storage in Surrey
meta_description: For home & business removals in Leatherhead - Mark Ratcliffe Moving offer a complete moving & storage service to clients across Surrey including Guildford, Epsom & Redhill. Having worked in the industry for more than 30 years, we provide local & national moves, secure self storage & packing services.

intro_paragraph: Choosing the right removals company to move your furniture and possessions is extremely important. raw_body:
EMAIL US

Fast, Efficient and Affordable Removals for Leatherhead, Surrey and London

With more than 30 years experience moving residents and businesses across Leatherhead and London, Mark Ratcliffe Moving's renowned moving, storage and packing service is the removal company of choice.

How can we help you today?

Moving Office or Home in Leatherhead? 

Welcome to Mark Ratcliffe Moving - Looking after Leatherhead Removals for more than 30 years

Choosing the right removals company to move your furniture and possessions is extremely important. You need to know you have secured good value for money, but also be confident that the team arriving on the morning of your move will know your requirements thoroughly and have the correct training and equipment to ensure a successful and straightforward move. Having worked in the UK domestic removals and storage market for over 30 years, Mark Ratcliffe Moving can satisfy all of these needs.

We work with domestic and commercial customers throughout Leatherhead, Surrey and London. Quality is at the heart of everything we do and we are proud of our well respected reputation within the industry, As one of just a handful of moving companies with a dedicated staff training centre, all of our staff are trained to the highest industry standards in packing fragile and non-fragile personal effects, wrapping and moving household furniture (for home and overseas moving), as well as customer services and vehicle loading. Competitive prices, high standards and a genuine commitment from everyone involved in your move is guaranteed when choosing Mark Ratcliffe Moving.

Professional and Insured Removal Company

Unlike other removal firms, we offer a complete moving service, taking care of every aspect of your move from beginning to end. From moving single items like 3 piece suites across town, to moving entire 4 bed households to the other side of England - we are well equipped with the latest equipment, knowledgeable staff and necessary skill to handle your move with ease.

Following your initial enquiry, Mark Ratcliffe will visit your home (at a time convenient for you) to carry out a site survey. During this time you can discuss all aspects of your forthcoming move including any packing or storage requirements, or insurance cover for your valuable possessions. A fixed quotation can be provided for moving, storage or packing and we also offer a house clearance service that we can provide further details on. On your moving day a fully trained and uniformed crew will arrive and lay down floor covers to protect your carpets and we will cover exposed doors and banisters etc. If required, they will also pack and move your belongings with the utmost care and transport them safely to your new home.

Safe and Secure Self Storage   

Our secure self storage rooms are available to rent for those who prefer to deposit / remove their own goods to / from store. The self storage rooms are available in a variety of sizes, our most popular size is the 77 sqft option (which equates to 850 cubic feet / 24 cubic metres). This sized room is rented out for £30 plus vat (per week) and with our storage rooms being much higher than local competitors and prices being over 50% less, you receive great value for money. Our self storage rooms are secure, damp free and clean and there is also great access for loading / unloading and you are the only key holder. 

Professional Packing Service 

As part of our complete moving service, we offer a full packing service which includes a full packing option and fragile item packing for your home or office. If you decide to carry out your own packing, we can provide flat pack moving boxes, plain paper, bubble wrap, tape etc. All products are minimal in cost. 

Contact our Team Today for a Free Quote on Removals in Leatherhead

Whether you are moving within Leatherhead, London or further afield in the UK, Mark Ratcliffe Moving is ready to help. We can satisfy all of your wider moving needs including secure storage, house clearance and export packing. Why not take a look at our testimonials to see what some of our happy customers had to say about our services.

Our friendly team would be delighted to give you a quote without any obligation. Our opening hours are Mon - Sat 08.30 - 17.00 or we can arrange an appointment for any other time including Sundays.
